title: StackPicks · GSAP — now 100% free (since 2025)

rows.title: ScrollTrigger now free too
rows.desc: The plugin people used to pay $99/yr for. Free since Webflow's acquisition.

rows.title: Tiny core, plugin architecture
rows.desc: Load only what you use. CSS animation can't compete with 1ms keyframe control.

rows.title: Framework-agnostic
rows.desc: React, Vue, Svelte, vanilla. Works wherever JavaScript runs. 20-year track record.

install.body: ScrollTrigger, SplitText, MorphSVG, Flip — every premium plugin is now in the free tier. No license keys.

rows.title: GSAP wins for
rows.desc: Complex scroll, SVG morphing, timelines, anything not React-state-driven.

rows.title: Motion wins for
rows.desc: React state-bound animations. Layout transitions. Gestures + drag.

rows.title: Use both side-by-side
rows.desc: GSAP for hero animations + scroll. Motion for in-app interactions. Common stack.

take.use_if: You build marketing sites, landing pages, or content-heavy scroll experiences. GSAP + ScrollTrigger is unbeaten. Now free, so no excuse.
take.skip_if: You only need component-level micro-interactions in a React app. Motion is the lighter pick there.

more.body: Motion · Anime.js · Theatre.js · Lottie · Three.js. Curated takes.
more.sub: 11 picks · all open source · updated this week

caption_line: GSAP is now 100% free — every plugin too. ScrollTrigger, SplitText, MorphSVG. The gold standard for web animation. Comment GSAP for the docs ↓
